allow: Bash(psql -d tesis_odoo18 -c "SELECT name, ttype, store FROM ir_model_fields WHERE model = ''estate.property'' AND name IN \(''garage'', ''parking_spaces'', ''bathrooms'', ''bedrooms''\);")
Bash(psql -d tesis_odoo18 -c "SELECT id, name, sequence, probability, is_won FROM crm_stage ORDER BY sequence;")
Bash(psql -d tesis_odoo18 -c "SELECT id, name, sequence, is_won FROM crm_stage ORDER BY sequence;")
Bash(psql -d tesis_odoo18 -c "SELECT l.id, l.name, l.type, s.name as stage FROM crm_lead l LEFT JOIN crm_stage s ON s.id = l.stage_id WHERE l.active = true ORDER BY l.stage_id LIMIT 20;")
